notes:
The game launches with a black screen that renders it useless. Also after fixing the black screen issue, you'll find that the textures in game are all blurry. 

To fix both problems you need to change the some values in your "Quake4Config.cfg" file which is stored in the "q4base" folder within the Quake 4 main install folder.

TO FIX BLACK SCREEN: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=175832751 

TO FIX BLURRY TEXTURES: https://www.gog.com/forum/quake_series/quake_4_low_res_texture_fix
title: Quake IV

notes: Runs better than on Windows: it runs without problem and loads the introduction cinematic.
title: Quake IV

notes:
I tried running this game using Proton v4.11-4 and v4.2-9 but the game lags in the game menu and it's impossible to do anything. 

My solution was to run the game using Proton v3.7-8 which runs great on a Lenovo x230.
title: Quake IV
